title: Minimum Number of Steps to Make Two Strings Anagram
titleCn: 制造字母异位词的最小步骤数

testcases.input: s = "bab", t = "aba" Output: 1 Explanation: Replace the first 'a' in t with b, t = "bba" which is anagram of s.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Replace the first 'a' in t with b, t = "bba" which is anagram of s.

testcases.input: s = "leetcode", t = "practice" Output: 5 Explanation: Replace 'p', 'r', 'a', 'i' and 'c' from t with proper characters to make t anagram of s.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: Replace 'p', 'r', 'a', 'i' and 'c' from t with proper characters to make t anagram of s.
